issue_title: When pressing the copy button in the code block, 'Copy' is copied along with it.
issue_body_preview:
### Preliminary Checks

- [X] This issue is not a duplicate. Before opening a new issue, please search existing issues: https://github.com/HugoBlox/hugo-blox-builder/issues?q=is%3Aissue
- [X] This issue is not a question, feature request, or anything other than a bug report directly related to Hugo
test_description_zh: 在包含代码块的页面中，找到一个代码块并点击其右上角的复制按钮，然后将剪贴板内容粘贴到一个文本编辑器或输入框中，检查粘贴的内容是否仅包含代码块中的代码文本。
expected_result_zh: 点击代码块的复制按钮后，剪贴板中仅包含代码块内的代码内容，不会额外包含按钮上的 'Copy' 文字。粘贴结果应与代码块中显示的代码完全一致。
